prices.source_phrase: All active duty military and their families (with ID) – military ID holder up to 5 family members.
prices.source_block:
General admission is free to:

All active duty military and their families (with ID) – military ID holder up to 5 family members. The military ID holder can be either active duty service member or other dependent family member with the appropriate ID card.

Military veterans (with ID)

reservation.source_phrase: For groups (10+) docent-led tours are available with advance notice.
reservation.source_block: The Icon Museum and Study Center is a wonderful place to explore: discover our unique permanent collection, temporary exhibitions, and browse the Museum Shop. For families with children, we offer magnifying glasses and an all-ages scavenger hunt for use in the galleries. For groups (10+) docent-led tours are available with advance notice.

hours.source_block:
HOURS

Thursday – Sunday, 10:00am – 4:00pm

Closed: Easter, July 4, Thanksgiving, and Christmas Eve through New Year’s Day. FREE FIRST SUNDAYS: Enjoy free admission on the first Sunday of each month, courtesy of the Nypro Foundation.
